equivalents_en: sound of the sea as it recedes after a wave has broken on the shore
equivalents_sw: sauti ya maji ya bahari yanayorudi baada ya wimbi

senses.definition_en: sound of the sea as it recedes after a wave has broken on the shore
senses.definition_sw: sauti ya maji ya bahari yanayorudi baada ya wimbi
senses.definition_dg: Sauti ya madzi ga bahari gachiuyira nyuma bada ya wimbi kuvundza ufukoni.

examples.dg: Sauti ya waaa inasikiwa kanda-kanda ya bahari.
examples.en: The sound of the receding sea is heard by the shore.
examples.sw: Sauti ya maji yanayorudi inasikika kando ya bahari.

senses.definition_en: to grill, to roast, to dry meat or fish using heat from a fire
senses.definition_dg: Kuchoma nyama au samaki kpwa moho ili viume, kukaanga kpwa moho.

examples.dg: Wada samaki kpwa moho hadi aive.
examples.en: Grill the fish on the fire until it is done.
examples.sw: Choma samaki kwa moto hadi aive.

equivalents_en: dehusk (to remove skins or shells from beans etc)

senses.definition_en: to dehusk (to remove skins or shells from beans etc)
senses.definition_dg: Kuusa maganda ga maharagwe au kunde kpwa kupuha.

examples.dg: Waga maharagwe kabila ya kupika.
examples.en: Dehusk the beans before cooking.
examples.sw: Toa maganda ya maharagwe kabla ya kupika.

senses.definition_dg: Kupiga mutu kofi usoni au chitwani.

examples.dg: Usimwaguze mwanache, gomba naye.
examples.en: Don't slap the child, talk to him.
examples.sw: Usimpige mtoto kofi, sema naye.

senses.definition_dg: Siku ya hahu kula rero, bada ya muhondo na bada ya muhondowe.

examples.dg: Hundakpwutana wairya.
examples.en: We will meet three days from now.
examples.sw: Tutakutana siku ya tatu kutoka leo.

equivalents_en: wa kuandika inaandikpwa kama ku ili kuonyesa ambavyo ganaungana na neno

senses.definition_en: wa kuandika inaandikpwa kama ku ili kuonyesa ambavyo ganaungana na neno
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kisarufi kuhusu namna ya kuandika maneno ga Chidigo.

examples.dg: Wakati wa kuandika Chidigo, maandishi ni muhimu.
examples.en: When writing Digo, the spelling is important.
examples.sw: Wakati wa kuandika Kidigo, tahajia ni muhimu.

senses.definition_dg: Muda, chipindi, wakati fulani.

examples.dg: Wakati wa mvula ni mnono kpwa ukulima.
examples.en: The rainy season is good for farming.
examples.sw: Wakati wa mvua ni mzuri kwa kilimo.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayetetea atu mbere za korti, mutu wa shariya.

examples.dg: Wakili wamtetea mgonjwa mbere za hakimu.
examples.en: The lawyer defended the accused before the judge.
examples.sw: Wakili alimtetea mshtakiwa mbele ya hakimu.

examples.dg: Muhi tauna makodza wala matunda
examples.en: The tree has neither leaves nor fruit

examples.dg: Sidzangbweogopha wala kurira
examples.en: I have never been afraid nor have I cried

equivalents_en: mayo first cousin in the maternal line

senses.definition_en: mayo first cousin in the maternal line
senses.definition_dg: Binamu, mwanache wa ndugu wa mayo.

examples.dg: Wana mayo ni binamu wangu wa phahi-phahi.
examples.en: My maternal cousin is my close relative.
examples.sw: Binamu wa mama ni ndugu yangu wa karibu.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa utoto, kpwa namna ya anache.

examples.dg: Usihende mambo wanache, u mkpwulu sambi.
examples.en: Don't do things childishly, you are grown up now.
examples.sw: Usifanye mambo ya kitoto, wewe ni mkubwa sasa.

senses.definition_dg: Rangi nyeusi inayoikpwa kpwenye matso kpwa urembo.

examples.dg: Mchetu waika wanda matsoni.
examples.en: The woman applied kohl to her eyes.
examples.sw: Mwanamke aliweka wanja machoni.

senses.definition_en: spacious, (of a container) having enough space
senses.definition_dg: Chenye nafasi nyinji, pana, si cha kubana.

examples.dg: Nyumba hino ni ya wanga-wanga, ina nafasi nyinji.
examples.en: This house is spacious, it has a lot of room.
examples.sw: Nyumba hii ni pana, ina nafasi nyingi.

equivalents_en: quick (having the ability to do something quickly)

senses.definition_en: quick (having the ability to do something quickly)
senses.definition_dg: Wa haraka, mwenye uwezo wa kuhenda mambo haraka.

examples.dg: Mwanache yuya ni wangbwi sana kpwa kazi.
examples.en: That child is very quick at work.
examples.sw: Mtoto yule ni haraka sana kwa kazi.

senses.definition_dg: Kujeza kpwa nguvu zosi, kuhenda bidii.

examples.dg: Waniya kumaliza kazi kabila ya dziloni.
examples.en: He tried hard to finish the work before evening.
examples.sw: Alijitahidi kumaliza kazi kabla ya jioni.

senses.definition_dg: Muhindi au mtsere uriophikpwa na madzi hadi ukale mgumu, ugali.

examples.dg: Mayo wapika wari wa muhogo.
examples.en: Mother cooked cassava meal.
examples.sw: Mama alipika ugali wa muhogo.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa lugha ya kisasa, wali wa mtsere uriophikpwa.

examples.dg: Wari na mchuzi wa samaki ni chakurya chinono.
examples.en: Rice and fish stew is a delicious meal.
examples.sw: Wali na mchuzi wa samaki ni chakula kitamu.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kutokuwa na amani moyoni, mashaka.

examples.dg: Usikale na wasi-wasi, mambo gandakala sawa.
examples.en: Don't worry, things will be fine.
examples.sw: Usiwe na wasiwasi, mambo yatakuwa sawa.

sub_entries.definition_en: to fear, to be afraid, to worry
sub_entries.definition_sw: kuogopa, kufadhaika, kuona shaka, kuhangaika, kujihangaisha

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya wizara.

examples.dg: Wasiya ni neno ranjine ra wizara.
examples.en: Wasiya is another word for wizara.
examples.sw: Wasiya ni neno jingine la wizara.

senses.definition_dg: Maneno ga mwisho ambago mutu anagomba kabila ya kufwa, wosia.

examples.dg: Mkare wahewa wasiya kabila ya kufwa.
examples.en: The elder gave his will before dying.
examples.sw: Mzee alitoa wosia kabla ya kufa.

senses.definition_dg: Bibi, nyanya, mayo wa mayo au mayo wa baba.

examples.dg: Ano wawa ndiye arimulere.
examples.en: His grandmother is the one who raised him.
examples.sw: Bibi yake ndiye aliyemlea.

senses.definition_dg: Chuma chidzengbwacho dza uzi, waya.

examples.dg: Chama cha kuku chidzengbwa na waya.
examples.en: The chicken coop is made of wire mesh.
examples.sw: Banda la kuku limejengwa na waya.

senses.definition_en: under the weather, feeling as if one will fall sick, in a confused state
senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kudzidzisikira vinono, dza mutu anayeandza kuumwa.

examples.dg: Ninadzidzisikira wayu-wayu, labda nina homa.
examples.en: I'm feeling under the weather, maybe I have a fever.
examples.sw: Najisikia vibaya, labda nina homa.

senses.definition_dg: Phenye kupho, bila kufunikpwa, wazi.

examples.dg: Mulango u wazi, injira ndani.
examples.en: The door is open, enter inside.
examples.sw: Mlango uko wazi, ingia ndani.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala wazi, kutokuwa na siri.

examples.dg: Gomba wazi-wazi, usifwitse chochosi.
examples.en: Speak clearly, don't hide anything.
examples.sw: Sema wazi wazi, usifiche chochote.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa wazi, bila kufwitsa, kpwa kueleweka.

examples.dg: Waeleza mambo wazi-wazi mbere za atu.
examples.en: He explained things clearly before the people.
examples.sw: Alieleza mambo wazi wazi mbele ya watu.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu mkpwulu wa serikali anayeongoza wizara.

examples.dg: Waziri wa afya wakpwedza mudzini.
examples.en: The Minister of Health came to the village.
examples.sw: Waziri wa afya alikuja kijijini.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra ufupi ra uwe, wewe.

examples.dg: We, kpwedza phano!
examples.en: You, come here!
examples.sw: Wewe, njoo hapa!

senses.definition_dg: Kutembea, kuphiya kpwa magulu.

examples.dg: Hunaweha hadi sukuli chila siku.
examples.en: We walk to school every day.
examples.sw: Tunatembea hadi shule kila siku.

sub_entries.definition_en: wander about, to go visiting people

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kudzidzisikira vinono, kutokuwa na afya ndzuri.

examples.dg: Ninadzidzisikira weje-weje, siweza kuhenda kazi.
examples.en: I'm feeling unwell, I can't work.
examples.sw: Ninajisikia vibaya, siwezi kufanya kazi.

senses.definition_dg: Kuinamisha chitu upande mmwenga, kupindia.

examples.dg: Usiweke ndoo, madzi gandamwagika.
examples.en: Don't tilt the bucket, the water will spill.
examples.sw: Usiimamishe ndoo, maji yatamwagika.

senses.definition_dg: Chombo kidide cha chuma ambacho chinahumirwa kunyola au kukata.

examples.dg: Humira wembe kpwa uangalifu usidzeche.
examples.en: Use the razor blade carefully so you don't cut yourself.
examples.sw: Tumia wembe kwa uangalifu usijikata.

senses.definition_dg: Zawadi inayohewa mchumba wakati wa uchumba.

examples.dg: Bwana arusi walavya wende kpwa mchumba wake.
examples.en: The groom gave an engagement gift to his fiancée.
examples.sw: Bwana arusi alitoa zawadi kwa mchumba wake.

senses.definition_en: to settle, to subside, to go down (as in a filled pit latrine when left
senses.definition_dg: Kupungua, kuisha, kusagara (dza choo chenye kujala chikisagara).

examples.dg: Madzi ga kisima gakawerera.
examples.en: The well water subsided.
examples.sw: Maji ya kisima yalipungua.

senses.definition_dg: Kukosa chitu, kuishiwa.

examples.dg: Hwawererwa ni chakurya, hundaphiya dukani.
examples.en: We ran out of food, we will go to the shop.
examples.sw: Tumeishiwa na chakula, tutaenda dukani.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala na achili nyinji, busara.

examples.dg: Werevu wa mutu unammanya.
examples.en: A person's cleverness defines them.
examples.sw: Werevu wa mtu unamjulikana.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha nyika ambapho hakuna atu wala mihi, jangbwa.

examples.dg: Waishi weruni kpwa miaka minji.
examples.en: He lived in the wilderness for many years.
examples.sw: Aliishi nyikani kwa miaka mingi.

equivalents_en: lay a container on its side

senses.definition_en: to lay a container on its side
senses.definition_dg: Kuika chombo kpwa upande wache badala ya kuchiimisa wima.

examples.dg: Wesa ndoo photsi ili isidzale madzi ga mvula.
examples.en: Lay the bucket on its side so it doesn't fill with rainwater.
examples.sw: Laza ndoo kwa upande ili isijae maji ya mvua.

senses.definition_dg: Kuogopha kpwa ghafula, kushtuka.

examples.dg: Wawewehuka ariphosikira sauti ya chiguru-guru.
examples.en: He was scared when he heard the sound of thunder.
examples.sw: Alishtuka aliposikia sauti ya ngurumo.

senses.definition_en: to be able to do something, can
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na uwezo wa kuhenda chitu.

examples.dg: Naweza kuhenda kazi hiyo mimi bahi.
examples.en: I can do that work by myself.
examples.sw: Ninaweza kufanya kazi hiyo mimi mwenyewe.

equivalents_en: Digo is not their mother tongue. The pronunciation of most (combinations of) letters in Digo is very similar to the

senses.definition_en: Digo is not their mother tongue. The pronunciation of most (combinations of) letters in Digo is very similar to the
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kisarufi kuhusu matamshi ga Chidigo kpwa atu ambao Chidigo si lugha yao ya kuzaliwa.

examples.dg: Matamshi ga Chidigo ganafwanana na ga Chiswahili.
examples.en: Digo pronunciation is similar to Swahili.
examples.sw: Matamshi ya Kidigo yanafanana na ya Kiswahili.

senses.definition_en: sister-in-law (sister of a woman's husband, or wife of a woman's brother)
senses.definition_dg: Ndugu wa mchetu wa mumewe, au mchetu wa ndugu wa mchetu.

examples.dg: Wifi wangu ni mutu mnono sana.
examples.en: My sister-in-law is a very good person.
examples.sw: Wifi wangu ni mtu mzuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kusimama sawa-sawa, chocho.

examples.dg: Muhi uho usimama wima.
examples.en: That tree stands upright.
examples.sw: Mti ule umesimama wima.

equivalents_sw: shimo refu la ndani kwa ndani

senses.definition_sw: shimo refu la ndani kwa ndani
senses.definition_dg: Shimo rire ra ndani kpwa ndani, tuneli.

examples.dg: Wina unahendwa kutsupira kpwenye mlima.
examples.en: A tunnel is made to pass through a mountain.
examples.sw: Tuneli inatengenezwa kupitia mlima.

senses.definition_dg: Kazi ya kuindza nyama tsakani, uwindaji.

examples.dg: Hangu kare jadi mutu nkuphiya windzani na uha na ryaka ra mivi
examples.en: An old custom is that a person goes hunting with a bow and a quiver of arrows
examples.sw: Tangu zamani mtu huenda msituni na upinde na podo ya mishale.

examples.dg: Windza wa rero ukakala na atu anji
examples.en: There were many people at today's hunting
examples.sw: Tangu zamani mtu huenda msituni na upinde na podo ya mishale.

equivalents_sw: wakati mtu hawezi kuona vizuri kwa sababu ya giza

senses.definition_en: poor visibility, such as in pre-dawn light
senses.definition_sw: wakati mtu hawezi kuona vizuri kwa sababu ya giza
senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kutokuona vizuri, dza alfajiri au dziloni.

examples.dg: Kuna wiri-wiri, dzuwa taridzangbwetuluka.
examples.en: There is poor visibility, the sun hasn't risen yet.
examples.sw: Hakuonekani vizuri, jua bado halijachomoza.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kutomendza mutu munjine aphahe vitu vinono, choyo.

examples.dg: Wivu ni chitu kibaya, usikale nacho.
examples.en: Jealousy is a bad thing, don't have it.
examples.sw: Wivu ni kitu kibaya, usiwe nacho.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya serikali ambayo inaongozwa ni waziri.

examples.dg: Wizara ya afya inaterya atu kpwa dawa.
examples.en: The Ministry of Health helps people with medicine.
examples.sw: Wizara ya afya inasaidia watu kwa dawa.

equivalents_en: yeyesi Alii works in the Ministry of Health

senses.definition_en: yeyesi Alii works in the Ministry of Health
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kisarufi kuhusu mahumizi ga maneno.

examples.dg: Alii anafwanya kazi kpwenye wizara ya afya.
examples.en: Alii works in the Ministry of Health.
examples.sw: Alii anafanya kazi kwenye wizara ya afya.

equivalents_sw: kukosa kuona vizuri kwa ajili ya giza ama mosi

senses.definition_en: poor visibility due to darkness, smoke or fog
senses.definition_sw: kukosa kuona vizuri kwa ajili ya giza ama mosi
senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kutokuona vizuri kpwa sababu ya giza, mosi au ukungu.

examples.dg: Naona wizi-wizi kpwa sababu ya mosi.
examples.en: I have blurred vision because of the smoke.
examples.sw: Naona wizi-wizi kwa sababu ya mosi.

senses.definition_dg: Kutokuonekana sawa-sawa, kukala na waa.

examples.dg: Naona wiziwizi kpwa sababu ya mosi
examples.en: I couldn't see well because of the smoke
examples.sw: Macho yangu yanaona wizi-wizi, nahitaji miwani.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya chimea cha kurya chinahokomala kpwenye muhi urioola au tsongo.

examples.dg: Woga unakomala wakati wa mvula.
examples.en: Mushrooms grow during the rainy season.
examples.sw: Uyoga unakua wakati wa mvua.
